description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) was operating in autonomous mode, traveling east in the right lane of 15th Street between Mission and Wiese 
Streets in San Francisco. As it approached a double-parked passenger car (Vehicle 2) in the lane, the operator of the Zoox vehicle 
disengaged from autonomous driving. The operator then moved into the left lane and maneuvered around Vehicle 2. The driver of Vehicle 2 
started moving just as the Zoox vehicle was re-entering the right lane, and shortly after, the right front area of the Zoox vehicle made contact
 with the left front area of Vehicle 2. The Zoox vehicle did not sustain any damage, but Vehicle 2 sustained moderate damage to its left front 
door. There were no reported injuries, and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
